title: rubus subvillosus
intro: Rubus subvillosus, also known as the bristly dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus subvillosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
